name: Darkvision
description: You can see in dim light within 60 feet as if it were bright light.

name: Fey Ancestry
description: You have advantage on saving throws against being charmed.

name: Stonecunning
description: Whenever you make a History check related to stonework, add double proficiency.

name: Second Wind
description: You can use a bonus action to regain 1d10 + fighter level hit points.

name: Action Surge
description: On your turn, you can take one additional action.

name: Sneak Attack
description: Once per turn, deal extra 1d6 damage to one creature you hit.

name: Spellcasting
description: You have the ability to cast spells using your spellcasting ability.

name: Lucky
description: When you roll a 1, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll.
